text: As used in the compact, with reference to this State, the term “executive head” shall mean the Governor.

# Vehicle Code
## Division 6. DRIVERS' LICENSES [12500 - 15326]
### Chapter 6. Driver License Compact [15000 - 15028]
#### Article 1. Generally [15000 - 15003]
##### § 15003

As used in the compact, with reference to this State, the term “executive head” shall mean the Governor.

*(Added by Stats. 1963, Ch. 237.)*

subsections.text: As used in the compact, with reference to this State, the term “executive head” shall mean the Governor.
